ops.text: E37 MoE ceiling sweep DONE: 3/3 cells (ranks 16/32/64, LR 1e-4, seed 1729), $76.65 under $85 cap, all cells auc_match=true (independent recompute). INTERIM (guidance frame e85dc4a2, hosted full-precision scoring, servable=false): ceiling AUC 0.9363 @ r16 vs incumbent 0.9317 (+0.0046 — under even the old frame's paired MDE) and vs 8B-FT mean 0.9274 (+0.0089). Rank ordering on the frame INVERTS tinker-val ordering (r16 wins frame, r64 wins val) — overfit tell. Provisional verdict consistent with campaign thesis: 4.5x base buys no detectable headroom on the old instrument even ignoring servability. Certify pass on the rebuilt trustworthy frame folded into the re-certification task (train_score.py --frame --certify).
